description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular form, surrounded by a low green hedge. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray color, with large, grid-style windows providing ample natural light to the interior. The front features a covered porch area with a black awning and glass doors, while the side and rear facades have fewer windows and a more solid appearance. The property is enclosed by a white picket fence on one side and dense hedges on the others, creating a private garden space. The interior layout is visible from above, showing multiple rooms and open spaces. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open views, and a blend of indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, a covered porch, and surrounding green hedges, featuring a minimalist and open design.
description_view_0: Side view showing a large window, the white picket fence, and the hedge-lined garden area.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the covered porch, black awning, and main entrance with large glass doors.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a solid wall, a single window, and extensive hedge coverage.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying grouped windows, the back garden, and the continuation of the hedge enclosure.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grid windows on front and side facades
